title: Seseli krylovii
intro: Seseli krylovii is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Seseli krylovii contains bioactive constituents such as sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Seseli krylovii is used in herbal medicine and is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
